Localization.Description: Suspicious authentication in Multifactor. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.host} was authenticated in Multifactor using new method "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. The method is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.host} was authenticated in Multifactor from new device {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}. The device is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.host} was authenticated in Multifactor on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.host} was authenticated in Multifactor from new location "{external_src.geo.city}/{external_src.geo.country}" on host {event_src.host}. The location is missing from the collected profile.
